lemon_market_new_listings.description: Get ready for a great deal on this dependable ride! It's in fair condition, showing some honest character and wear from its time on the road, but it remains a solid and functional vehicle. This is a fantastic opportunity to own a reliable car at an accessible price point!
Poor condition.

The car is in fair condition. The exterior and interior show noticeable signs of wear and some minor cosmetic damage. While the vehicle is functional, it may require maintenance or minor repairs in the near future.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, having been preserved in a climate-controlled garage and maintained with no expense spared. The exterior paint is flawless, retaining its original showroom shine without a single chip, scratch, or swirl mark. Inside, the leather upholstery remains supple and free of any wear, smells fresh, and all electronic components function perfectly. Mechanically, the car is sound, with a complete service history documenting every scheduled maintenance. It drives exactly as it did the day it left the dealership. A rare find for a collector or anyone seeking a showroom-quality vehicle.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The engine runs smoothly, and the transmission shifts reliably through all gears without hesitation. While the exterior shows some minor cosmetic wear, including a few small stone chips on the front bumper and light surface scratches consistent with regular use, the body remains straight and the paint has a healthy shine. Inside, the cabin is clean and well-preserved, though there is some minor wear on the driver's seat bolster and floor mats. All electronic features, including the air conditioning and infotainment system, are fully functional. This is a dependable vehicle that is ready for the road and requires no immediate mechanical attention.
This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and small dents. The interior shows moderate wear and some staining. All major mechanical systems are currently operational.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of mechanical sophistication and proven reliability. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, the powertrain and essential systems demonstrate consistent performance standards. The aesthetic presentation remains highly commendable, reflecting a history of diligent care. We offer this refined automobile as a superior choice for those who demand excellence and value in their next acquisition.

Hey everyone! I’m parting ways with my reliable daily driver, and it’s been such a fantastic car to own. It’s in really solid shape—super clean inside and out, and it drives like a dream! It’s perfect for someone who wants a dependable, great-looking ride that’s ready for any adventure. I've taken good care of it, and I'm sure you'll love it as much as I have. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This E92 M3 features the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8, delivering linear power delivery up to its soaring 8,400 RPM redline. Mechanically sound with documented rod bearing service and throttle actuator replacements, it utilizes a lightning-fast 7-speed M-DCT for crisp gear changes. The chassis remains taut, benefitting from the M-specific suspension tuning and a functional M Variable Differential Lock for optimal corner-exit traction. While showing light signs of use consistent with its age, the drivetrain remains robust and the hydraulic steering rack offers the telepathic feedback enthusiasts crave.
Used car. Good condition. Regularly maintained. Runs well. Clean title.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between daily utility and premium comfort. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish that has been regularly waxed, showing only the minor, expected signs of careful road use such as faint stone chips on the lower front valance. Inside, you’ll find a smoke-free cabin with plush seating; the upholstery is supple and clean, and while there is light creasing on the driver’s side bolster, the overall interior remains crisp and inviting. Every electronic feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the intuitive infotainment system, functions exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule, with a recent oil change and a comprehensive multi-point inspection already completed. The tires have plenty of tread remaining, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. This car is a fantastic example of a well-loved vehicle that is mechanically sound and aesthetically pleasing, ready to provide its next owner with many miles of reliable, enjoyable driving.

Presenting a vehicle of distinguished character and proven reliability. This model has been maintained to a high standard, ensuring a seamless transition for its next discerning owner. Featuring a well-appointed interior and robust mechanical integrity, it offers a sophisticated driving experience that represents an exceptional value proposition. We invite you to experience the enduring quality and refined performance of this premier automotive investment.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both performance and reliability. This unit has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for executive-level transport. With a proven service history and a refined aesthetic, it offers an exceptional balance of value and prestige. We invite discerning buyers to experience this well-preserved example of automotive excellence.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty car, and it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-cared for over the years. Perfect for someone looking for a reliable daily driver that still looks great on the road. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how it handles!

Used car in good condition. Well maintained. Clean title. Reliable daily driver.

Presented in a striking finish that captures the light beautifully, this vehicle exemplifies genuine pride of ownership. The exterior bodywork remains crisp and well-defined, showing only the negligible stone chips expected from careful road use, while the alloy wheels remain clean and sharp. Step inside to a sanctuary of a cabin where the upholstery is supple and the carpets are pristine; every feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system, operates with precision. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, having benefited from a rigorous maintenance schedule that ensures a smooth, responsive power delivery and tight, predictable handling. This is a dependable and aesthetically pleasing example, offering the perfect balance of sophisticated style and mechanical reliability for a buyer who appreciates a car that has been treated with respect.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Featuring a robust powertrain and a refined interior, this unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity. Presented in commendable aesthetic and structural condition, it offers a sophisticated driving experience and exceptional long-term value.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a superior acquisition for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for roadworthiness and reliability. A prime example of enduring quality and performance, it offers a refined driving experience and exceptional value.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s been absolutely wonderful to own. It’s in really solid shape and has clearly been well-cared for over the years. Whether you're commuting or heading out on a weekend road trip, this car is reliable, super comfortable, and ready to hit the road with its next owner! I'd love for it to go to someone who will enjoy it as much as I have.

Used car. Good condition. Mechanically sound. Well-maintained interior. Clean title.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in reliable, well-cared-for condition. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish with only minor road wear consistent with responsible use. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free, featuring supple upholstery and a fully functional dashboard with all electronics operating as intended. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly, benefiting from regular fluid changes and recent professional inspections. It drives straight, brakes firmly, and offers a comfortable, quiet ride. Whether you're commuting or taking a weekend trip, this car provides a balanced blend of performance and comfort without the worry of deferred maintenance. It comes with a complete service history and is ready for its next owner to drive away today.

Presenting a distinguished vehicle that balances refined performance with exceptional value. This well-maintained example features a robust powertrain and a clean, preserved interior, having passed a rigorous multi-point mechanical inspection to ensure continued reliability. It represents a premier acquisition for the professional driver who demands a sophisticated aesthetic and a dependable service history.

This exceptional vehicle exemplifies a high standard of automotive care and mechanical integrity. Thoroughly inspected and professionally detailed, it presents in commendable condition, offering a sophisticated driving experience and long-term reliability. A premier selection for the discerning professional seeking superior value in a pre-owned investment.

Hey there! I'm selling my trusty ride and it's looking for a new home. It’s been super reliable and is in really solid shape—it's been well-loved and is ready to hit the road with you today! It drives like a dream and is perfect for someone looking for a dependable car without the brand-new price tag. Come take it for a spin!

Available is a mechanically sound 2017 Shelby GT350, featuring the iconic 5.2L Voodoo V8 with its distinctive flat-plane crankshaft and 8,250 RPM redline. This high-revving powerhouse is mated to a Tremec TR-3160 six-speed manual transmission and a Torsen limited-slip differential with a 3.73 rear gear ratio. The chassis dynamics are sharpened by a MagneRide Damping System and high-thermal-capacity Brembo braking hardware. Maintained with enthusiast-level care, the vehicle exhibits excellent compression across all cylinders and a clean underside, representing a turn-key opportunity for the performance-driven buyer.
Used vehicle in good condition. Regularly serviced. Reliable performance. Clean title. Ready for immediate pickup.

This vehicle is a standout example of pride in ownership, offering a harmonious balance of performance and aesthetic appeal. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like gloss, showing only the lightest hints of road wear consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of comfort; the premium upholstery is free of tears, the dashboard remains crack-free, and every electronic feature—from the dual-zone climate control to the intuitive infotainment system—functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in robust health, characterized by a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that has been strictly maintained according to the manufacturer’s schedule. Recent service includes a fresh oil change and a comprehensive multi-point inspection, ensuring it is road-trip ready. With a clean title and a detailed service history, this car represents a reliable and sophisticated choice for the discerning driver who values quality and longevity.

Presenting a meticulously maintained specimen that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic discipline. This vehicle has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for reliability and performance. Featuring a well-preserved interior and a robust drivetrain, it offers a sophisticated driving experience for the discerning professional who demands excellence without compromise.
